# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: CodeGrind improvements: CI/CD, AI assistant upgrades, and security tweaks
- Summary: Showcase recent CodeGrind updates: CI/CD polish, Azure OpenAI integration enhancements, and streamlined authentication with Google sign-in.
- Slug: codegrind-ci-cd-and-ai-enhancements
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-ci-cd-and-ai-enhancements
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-06-14-codegrind-ci-cd-and-ai-enhancements.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind continues to evolve with robust CI/CD improvements, enhanced Azure OpenAI assistance, and a more seamless Google authentication flow. This campaign highlights the reliability, accessibility, and smarter support that users get as they practice DSA through our gamified platform.
- CTA: Explore the latest CodeGrind updates and try the improved AI-assisted problem solving and secure sign-in today.
- Visual brief: Static announcement-style graphic featuring CodeGrind UI elements: a clean dashboard mockup, a highlighted AI assistant chat panel, and a prominent Google sign-in button. Include subtle cyberpunk accents and a badge for CI/CD improvements.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
